events.title: Bridal Makeup Masterclass
events.description: Hands-on bridal makeup workshop with full kit provided. Led by our lead bridal artist. Perfect for aspiring MUAs and brides-to-be.

events.title: Natural Hair & Skincare Expo
events.description: Product demos, consultations, and live styling all day. Free entry for all beauty lovers.

events.title: Professional Makeup Academy — July Intake
events.description: 3-month intensive professional certification program. All levels welcome. Limited seats available.

events.title: Nail Art Workshop
events.description: Learn trending nail art techniques. Materials provided. Certificate of participation included.

events.title: VIP Glow Night
events.description: An evening of luxury treatments, product launches, and networking for beauty enthusiasts.
